name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in FiniteSubsets(N)
  /\ coordinator \in 1..N
  /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets({[sender: 1..N, receiver: 1..N, type: {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, payload: BOOLEAN}))

Init ==
  /\ participants = {}
  /\ coordinator = 1
  /\ messages = {}

Next ==
  \/ /\ participants' = participants \cup {coordinator}
     /\ messages' = messages
  \/ /\ participants' = participants
     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare", payload |-> TRUE] : p \in 1..N \ {coordinator} }
  \/ /\ participants' = participants
     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes", payload |-> TRUE] : p \in participants }
  \/ /\ participants' = participants
     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo", payload |-> FALSE] : p \in participants }
  \/ /\ participants' = participants
     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit", payload |-> TRUE] : p \in participants }
  \/ /\ participants' = participants
     /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort", payload |-> FALSE] : p \in participants }

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* State: state[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init ==
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

CanEat(i) ==
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[If i = 1 then N else i-1] = i

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "hungry"
        /\ CanEat(i)
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If i = 1 then N else i-1] = i]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If i = 1 then N else i-1] = i]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "thinking"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element e *)
Enqueue(e) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, e)
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ size' = size - 1

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ \E term \in Nat :
       /\ state = "Follower"
       /\ currentTerm' = term
       /\ votedFor' = {}
       /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {}
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
